name: Krea 2 Medium
description: Smaller, faster, more cost-efficient. Extensive post-training makes outputs especially stable and consistent across generations. Strongest on illustration, anime, painting, and other expressive or artistic styles.

input.prompt: An igloo village glowing with Aurora's colors.

code_snippets.label: typescript
curl

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio of the generated image.

complexity.description: K2 Complexity slider (-100 to 100). 0 disables the slider LoRA.

creativity.description: Prompt expansion mode. `raw` disables expansion; `low`, `medium`, `high` control strength. Does not affect the K2 Intensity, Complexity, or Movement slider LoRAs.

image_style_references.description: Reference images to drive the visual style (up to 10).

strength.description: Style influence (0 = no influence, 1 = maximum). Default 0.5.

url.description: URL of the reference image (max 1024 chars).

intensity.description: K2 Intensity slider (-100 to 100). 0 disables the slider LoRA.

strength.description: Moodboard influence (0 = no influence, 1 = maximum). Default 0.23.

movement.description: K2 Movement slider (-100 to 100). 0 disables the slider LoRA.

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the image to generate.

seed.description: Random seed for reproducible generations. Pass null or omit for a random seed.

styles.description: Styles (typically LoRAs) to apply to the generation.

image.description: Presigned URL for the generated image.
